task_description: Stabilize Fabric v1.7.0 + narrow AI client scope from 6 to 3 (Claude/Codex/Cursor) — combined 1.7.1 deprecation release + 1.8.0 stabilization release
summary: Combined 1.7.1 deprecation + 1.8.0 stabilization for Fabric. 42 tasks across 4 layers: Layer 0 infrastructure (atomic-write helper / FabricError taxonomy / SKILL canonical pipeline / migration-doc skeleton), Layer 1 foundation services (ledger queue / error collapse / rule-sync orchestrator), Layer 2 consumers (25 P0+P1 tasks across stability + UX), Layer 3 release packaging. Two-release strategy: 1.7.1 = 3 deprecation tasks cherry-picked to release/v1.7.1; 1.8.0 = mega-PR commit-per-task on release/v1.8.0-stabilization → main.
approach: Infrastructure-first 4-layer dependency graph (NOT release-phase nesting). Release phase encoded as metadata.release_tag. Hard ordering: Layer 0 primitives (atomic-write, FabricError, SKILL pipeline) block all consumers → Layer 1 foundation services (ledger queue, error collapse, rule-sync framework) block their consumers → Layer 2 max parallelism within layer (25 tasks, most independent). T-CONFIG-JSON-ATOMIC blocks T-MCP-CONFIG-PATH (Q2). T-CLIENT-NARROW precedes T-SCHEMA-EXPORT-AND-ANNOTATIONS (Gemini G4 — don't snapshot dying clients). T-SCHEMA + T-ANNOTATIONS paired commit (Gemini G6). All tasks: tests in same commit (D33 TDD-style). Single feature branch release/v1.8.0-stabilization; 1.7.1 cherry-pick to release/v1.7.1; 1.8.0 mega-PR with commit-per-task history.
parallelism_opportunities: Layer 0 (TASK-001/002/006 fully independent; TASK-003 → TASK-004 → TASK-005 short chain)
Layer 1 (after TASK-001 + TASK-002): TASK-007/008/009/010/011 mostly independent
Layer 2 P0 max parallel after primitives: TASK-013 / TASK-014 / TASK-015 / TASK-020 / TASK-022 / TASK-023 / TASK-024 all independent of each other once Layer 0/1 lands
Layer 2 P1 max parallel: TASK-026 / TASK-027 / TASK-029 / TASK-030 / TASK-031 / TASK-032 / TASK-034 / TASK-035 / TASK-036 fully independent of each other
1.7.1 batch (TASK-037/038/039) independent of 1.8.0 critical path; can land first
critical_path: TASK-001 (atomic helper) → TASK-016 (json/toml atomic) → TASK-017 (Claude config rewrite) → TASK-019 (client config snapshots)
TASK-002 (FabricError) → TASK-011 (rule-sync framework) → TASK-021 (tool entries) → TASK-041 (migration doc) → TASK-042 (mega-PR)

_metadata.branch_strategy: single feature branch release/v1.8.0-stabilization; 1.7.1 cherry-pick to release/v1.7.1; mega-PR with commit-per-task history
